0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Working Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The agent's immediate context — recent observations, active conversations, and current tool results. Fastest access, limited capacity, and subject to eviction."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Schema"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["|| Column | Type | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]," | TEXT | UUIDv4 primary key |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," | TEXT | Raw memory content |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," | TEXT | Origin (user, tool, observation) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}]," | TEXT | Application-level timestamp |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," | TEXT | Session grouping key (default: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"'default'"}],") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}]," | REAL | 0.0–1.0 importance score (default: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}],") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata_json"}]," | TEXT | Arbitrary JSON metadata blob |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]," | TIMESTAMP | Row creation time (SQLite ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CURRENT_TIMESTAMP"}],") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall_count"}]," | INTEGER | Number of times recalled (default: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"0"}],") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"last_recalled"}]," | TIMESTAMP | Last recall time (default: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"NULL"}],") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," | TIMESTAMP | TTL expiry time |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"superseded_by"}]," | TEXT | ID of newer version that replaces this entry |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scope"}]," | TEXT | Visibility scope (default: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"'global'"}],") |"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Indexes"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"idx_working_session"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"idx_working_timestamp"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"idx_working_source"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"FTS5"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Full-text search is maintained via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_working"}]," (content-column FTS5) with automatic triggers for INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Vector Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Embeddings are stored separately in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_episodes"}]," (sqlite-vec, int8[384]). They are generated at recall time and are ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"not"}]," a column in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"working_memory"}]," table."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Eviction Policy"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When Working Memory reaches capacity, entries are evicted by a composite score:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Importance weighting"}],": Higher importance = lower eviction priority"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recency"}],": Recently created or recalled entries are protected"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recall frequency"}],": Entries with higher ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall_count"}]," are protected"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Composite score"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"score = importance * recency_factor * recall_factor"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Consolidation Path"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[New Entry] -->|insert| WM[Working Memory]\n  WM -->|TTL/2 age trigger| C{Consolidation}\n  C -->|group by source| S[Summarize via LLM/AAAK]\n  S -->|promote| EM[Episodic Memory]\n  C -->|evict originals| DEL[Evicted]\n"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"API Reference"}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"# Store a memory\nmem.remember(content, importance=0.5, source=\"user\")\n\n# Recall memories (FTS5 + vector hybrid)\nresults = mem.recall(query, top_k=10)\n\n# Update a memory\nmem.update(id, content=None, importance=None)\n\n# Delete a single memory\nmem.forget(id)\n","language":"python"}],"\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7"],["$L8"],"$L9"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"5CS-Z2GOu_j-gS8atNSXn"}
5:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Performance"}]
6:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Metric"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Value"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Median write"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Median read"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"8ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Median recall"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"45ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Max capacity"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["10,000 entries (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX"}],")"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory footprint"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~50MB per 1K entries"}]]}]]}]]}]
7:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$La",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Tip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Use high importance (0.8+) for critical facts you want promoted to Episodic Memory. Use low importance (0.2-) for transient observations that should be evicted quickly."}]}]]}]]}]}]
